title: Lucy Is Replaced
description: Pages 6–10 focus on lucy is replaced, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as luffy meets Sabo again, entrusts him with the Colosseum fight, and the operation against Doflamingo moves forward.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's easy to say, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's a very 'opti- mistic' plan there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No one is able to predict...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What will happen to the whole of dressrossa in the next.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But whatever happens, there is one thing we must do first!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The one who has been turning people into toys is an agent of Doflamingo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's the power of the 'Hobby Fruit', we must make her lose conscious- Ness!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What do you think will happen if we succeed!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Eh...would it be...the 'magic' would be dis-pelled.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's right, all the toys in Dressrosa will all turn back into their own bodies!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And at the same time, all the people in the country will regain their lost memories!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Even we cannot predict what kind of reaction there might be in the country at that moment!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: How many will join our fight,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What do the citizens think and what will they do....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: What action will doFlamingo take!? And what about the Marines?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Right now, the only thing that can be foreseen is that there will be fear and panic in the country!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: So where is the 'Hobby Fruit' User Right Now!? ...Is she strong?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: According to information from Contata Scouts, she is at the trade port in the under- ground world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: She can turn anyone she touches into a toy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: She looks young, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: It is said that the body of the user stops growing once this devil fruit is eaten.

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: seen as 'the most import- ant figure' and protected by officer Trebol as her body- guard.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: So... as long as we can make this child lose con- sciousness...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: If we really manage to scare sugar into failing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Then we will have achieved SOP!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Since the enemy is just a small girl, everyone follow me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: UWAHA!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Great, my blood is boiling...'Franky Hair Salon'!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Combat hair- style!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Well said, as long as we are here, there are no battles we cannot win!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Take us to the 'underground tunnel' then, tiny ones!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Yeah!! It's the 'USSPLAND Squad'!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Inside the Coliseum...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Ha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Luffy currently looking for an exit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Weird!? Don't mind the exit....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: I don't even know where I am!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Isn't that the toilet.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Hey!! Don't just open the door like that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: I have to become a follower of Luffy Senpa!! That is my dream...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Hey!! It's you again!! That's great!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Uwah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: !...UFFY SENPA!!!!

summary: Lucy Is Replaced focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as luffy meets Sabo again, entrusts him with the Colosseum fight, and the operation against Doflamingo moves forward.
